name: 5'x7' Color Blocked Linear Area Rug Tan/Black - Threshold™
description:
Transform any space into a cozy haven with this Color Blocked Linear Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular area rug features a colorblock linear pattern on a tan backdrop to elevate your space while blending effortlessly with a variety of decor aesthetics. Easy to clean, this medium-pile accent rug makes a perfect pick for a variety of rooms.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
